intended_use: The SpectralMD™ DeepView™ Wound Imaging System 2.0 is an optical imaging device intended for studies of blood flow in the microcirculation. The DeepView system is suitable for a wide variety of clinic
intended_use_full: The SpectralMD™ DeepView™ Wound Imaging System 2.0 is an optical imaging device intended for studies of blood flow in the microcirculation. The DeepView system is suitable for a wide variety of clinical applications including plastic surgery, diabetes, dermatology, vascular surgery, wound healing, neurology, physiology, neurosurgery and anesthetics. In particular, it can be used for measuring perfusion of healthy and injured skin including burn wounds, skin flaps (plastic and reconstructive surgery), chronic wounds, decubitus ulcers, and diabetic ulcers.
target_condition: Wounds requiring perfusion assessment including burn wounds, skin flaps, chronic wounds, decubitus ulcers, and diabetic ulcers
ground_truth: Predicate device (original DeepView Digital Video Physiological Portable Imaging System) performance
other_metrics: Ability to identify 2% alternating change (AC) modulation consistent with tissue-volume change from blood flow; AC modulation detection at various frequencies within human heart rate range; detection of fluid flow beneath optically dense medium
